GitHubApiData.name: nest-mini-drop-in-pcb
GitHubApiData.description: Drop-in PCB replacement for the Google Nest Mini v2 with XMOS integration. Inspired by Onju Voice and Home Assistant Voice PE hardware.

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-TW: 可直接替換 Google Nest Mini v2 的 PCB，並整合 XMOS。靈感來自 Onju Voice 和 Home Assistant Voice PE 硬體。
TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: 适用于 Google Nest Mini v2 的即插式 PCB 替换板，集成 XMOS。灵感来源于 Onju Voice 和 Home Assistant Voice PE 硬件。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: XMOS統合を備えたGoogle Nest Mini v2用のドロップインPCB交換。Onju VoiceおよびHome Assistant Voice PEハードウェアに触発されています。
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: XMOS 통합이 적용된 Google Nest Mini v2용 드롭인 PCB 교체품입니다. Onju Voice와 Home Assistant Voice PE 하드웨어에서 영감을 받았습니다.
TranslatedDescriptions.hi: Google Nest Mini v2 के लिए XMOS इंटीग्रेशन के साथ ड्रॉप-इन PCB रिप्लेसमेंट। Onju Voice और Home Assistant Voice PE हार्डवेयर से प्रेरित।
TranslatedDescriptions.th: แผ่นวงจร PCB ทดแทนสำหรับ Google Nest Mini v2 พร้อมการเชื่อมต่อ XMOS ออกแบบโดยได้รับแรงบันดาลใจจาก Onju Voice และฮาร์ดแวร์ Home Assistant Voice PE
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Drop-in PCB replacement for the Google Nest Mini v2 with XMOS integration. Inspired by Onju Voice and Home Assistant Voice PE hardware.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Remplacement de PCB prêt à l'emploi pour le Google Nest Mini v2 avec intégration XMOS. Inspiré par Onju Voice et le matériel Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.de: Ersatz-Platine zum direkten Austausch für das Google Nest Mini v2 mit XMOS-Integration. Inspiriert von Onju Voice und Home Assistant Voice PE Hardware.
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Reemplazo de PCB compatible para el Google Nest Mini v2 con integración XMOS. Inspirado en Onju Voice y el hardware Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.it: Sostituzione PCB plug-and-play per Google Nest Mini v2 con integrazione XMOS. Ispirato all'hardware Onju Voice e Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.ru: Замена печатной платы для Google Nest Mini v2 с интеграцией XMOS. Вдохновлено аппаратными решениями Onju Voice и Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.pt: Substituição de PCB plug-and-play para o Google Nest Mini v2 com integração XMOS. Inspirado pelo Onju Voice e pelo hardware Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.nl: Vervangende printplaat (PCB) voor de Google Nest Mini v2 met XMOS-integratie. Geïnspireerd door Onju Voice en Home Assistant Voice PE hardware.
TranslatedDescriptions.pl: Wymienny PCB do Google Nest Mini v2 z integracją XMOS. Inspirowany Onju Voice oraz sprzętem Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.ar: بديل لوحة دوائر مطبوعة (PCB) جاهز لجهاز Google Nest Mini v2 مع دمج XMOS. مستوحى من أجهزة Onju Voice و Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.fa: جایگزین PCB آماده برای Google Nest Mini v2 با ادغام XMOS. الهام‌گرفته از سخت‌افزار Onju Voice و Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.tr: XMOS entegrasyonlu Google Nest Mini v2 için tak-çalıştır PCB değişimi. Onju Voice ve Home Assistant Voice PE donanımından ilham alınmıştır.
TranslatedDescriptions.vi: Bo mạch PCB thay thế trực tiếp cho Google Nest Mini v2 với tích hợp XMOS. Lấy cảm hứng từ phần cứng Onju Voice và Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.id: Pengganti PCB langsung untuk Google Nest Mini v2 dengan integrasi XMOS. Terinspirasi oleh perangkat keras Onju Voice dan Home Assistant Voice PE.
TranslatedDescriptions.as: Google Nest Mini v2 ৰ XMOS সংহতিসহ ড্ৰপ-ইন PCB পৰিৱৰ্তন। Onju Voice আৰু Home Assistant Voice PE হাৰ্ডৱেৰ দ্বাৰা অনুপ্ৰাণিত।
